other_observers: Seen with Mark Peterson, Lisa Edwards, Kara Lewantowicz, Bob and Lea Ann Brown, Peter Gent.; found by others before this date.
description: A warbler with bright yellow throat, green back, two white wing bars on both sides, long bill, yellow spectacles around each eye.Behaviors: The bird was in trees and came to a bird seed feeder.Call: heard long chip several times.Plumage: adult
